conversation_log.summary: Task aligns with frontend architecture: route in src/routes/ (TanStack Router file-based routing), data fetching via TanStack Query + oRPC client (no direct fetch), MUI components for rendering (ADR-008), sx prop only (no raw CSS/inline styles), i18n via useTranslation (react-i18next), translation keys in src/locales/en/common.json. Navigation link addition to NavigationMenu.tsx is consistent with existing layout component structure. No architectural changes required.
